spicy.text: Tell us about the last person who really caught your eye. What was it about them?
Tell us about the best compliment you've ever gotten. Who said it, and when?
Tell us about your first real crush. Paint us the whole picture.
Tell us about a time your flirting actually worked. How'd it go down?
Tell us about your idea of an unforgettable first date. Describe the night.
Tell us about a time you felt really wanted. What was happening?
Tell us about a dating opinion you'll defend. And the experience that gave it to you.
Tell us about a quality you used to ignore but now find irresistible. What changed?
Tell us about the last time you had a crush. And exactly what gave you away.
Tell us about the boldest thing you've done to get someone's attention.
Tell us about a way you show love that people don't always notice. A recent example?
Tell us about a time you wish you'd been braver in romance. What held you back?
Tell us about a romantic moment you've replayed in your head way too many times.
Tell us about something you really want in your next relationship that you've never said out loud.
Tell us about the most romantic thing you've ever done for someone. Walk us through it.
Tell us about a time you were drawn to someone and couldn't explain why.
Tell us about how you've grown in love since your last relationship. What's different now?
Tell us about a date scenario you keep daydreaming about.
Tell us about the most emotionally exposed you've let yourself be with someone.
Tell us about something you needed from a partner but were too scared to ask for.
Tell us about a pattern in who you fall for that you're trying to break.
Tell us about a time you felt deeply wanted. And a time you felt unwanted.
Tell us about a moment that showed you what real intimacy means to you.
Tell us about a part of yourself you struggle to let someone see. When did you last try?
Tell us about the kind of love you secretly hope exists for you.
Tell us about a regret you carry from how you treated someone you loved.
Tell us about what the most honest version of you would ask for in love.
Tell us about the bravest thing you'd do. Or have done. For the right person.
Everyone: describe your type in three words. Then defend them.
Everyone: tell us about the most attractive thing someone can do in a conversation.
Everyone: tell us one thing you wish people understood about how you love.
Everyone: confess your most-used flirting move. And a time it worked (or flopped).
Tell us about the first time someone made your heart actually race. What did they do?
Tell us about the best date you've ever been on. Set the scene for us.
Tell us about a trait you find unexpectedly attractive that you'd never put on a dating profile.
Tell us about the kind of flirting that actually works on you. Give us an example.
Tell us about your very first kiss. Where were you, and how did it happen?
Tell us about a time you caught feelings faster than you expected. What tipped you over?
Tell us about the boldest text you've ever sent. What happened after?
Tell us about something you secretly want to try with the right person but have never said out loud.
Tell us about a moment someone made you feel undeniably wanted. Walk us through it.
Tell us about a dealbreaker you used to have that you've completely let go of. What changed?
Tell us about a crush you never acted on. What stopped you?
Everyone: in one word, describe the last person who gave you butterflies. Then explain it.
Tell us about the most vulnerable you've ever let yourself be with someone you wanted.
Tell us about a time you loved someone more than they loved you. What did it teach you?
Tell us about the kind of closeness you're still hoping to find.
Tell us about a wall you put up in relationships that you know you need to lower.
Tell us about the moment you understood what you actually need to feel safe with someone.
Tell us about a person you think about more than you'd like to admit. What keeps them there?

deep.text: Tell us about a small moment this week that genuinely made you happy. Set the scene for us.
Tell us about where you grew up. Paint a picture of one street, room, or person from it.
Tell us about a dream you had as a kid. Where did it come from, and what happened to it?
Tell us about someone who makes you feel most like yourself. How did the two of you meet?
Tell us about something you're quietly proud of. Walk us through how it actually happened.
Tell us about a time recently you felt completely content. What were you doing in that moment?
Tell us about a little ritual or habit that grounds you. How did it start?
Tell us about something you're looking forward to. And the story of why it matters to you.
Tell us about a belief you used to hold strongly and let go of. What was the moment it changed?
Tell us about the last time you felt truly seen by someone. What exactly did they do?
Tell us about a goal you're chasing that scares you. Where are you in the journey right now?
Tell us about something you needed to hear as a kid but never did. Who do you wish had said it?
Tell us about something you're quietly working through these days. How's it been going?
Tell us about a time you really felt loved. Take us into what was happening.
Tell us about a part of yourself you usually keep hidden. When did you last let someone see it?
Tell us about a lesson from your family. And a time it actually played out in your life.
Tell us about a time you wish you'd been braver. What happened, and what held you back?
Tell us about a time you felt most like the person you want to become. What were you doing?
Tell us about a fear you don't usually talk about. When do you feel it most?
Tell us about something you're still trying to forgive yourself for. What happened?
Tell us about someone you miss right now. Share a specific memory with them.
Tell us about a dream you gave up on. Walk us through the moment you let it go.
Tell us about a time you were afraid people would find out something about you. What was at stake?
Tell us about the loneliest you've felt, even surrounded by people. What was going on?
Tell us about a relationship you wish you could repair. What happened between you two?
Tell us about the future you most want. Describe an ordinary day in that life.
Tell us something true about you that you've never told this group. Start wherever feels right.
Tell us about a time you surprised yourself with what you were capable of.
Everyone: tell the group one thing you admire about the person on your left. And a moment that showed it.
Everyone: tell us about one thing you wish you'd had more of growing up.
Everyone: tell us about a moment from the last year you're genuinely proud of.
Everyone: tell us about something that scares you that you're moving toward anyway.
Tell us about something small that brought you real peace this week. Paint the moment for us.
Tell us about a place from your childhood that still feels like home. Take us there.
Tell us about a quiet dream you're slowly building toward right now.
Tell us about a person who shaped who you are. How did they leave their mark?
Tell us about the last thing that made you laugh until it hurt. What was going on?
Tell us about a belief you outgrew. What was the moment it stopped fitting?
Tell us about a version of your life you sometimes wish you'd chosen. What draws you to it?
Tell us about a season that nearly broke you. What got you through it?
Tell us about the last time someone understood you without you having to explain. What did they catch?
Tell us about something you inherited from your family that you're proud to carry.
Tell us about a fear that runs more of your life than you'd like. Where did it start?
Everyone: name one thing you're working on about yourself right now, and why it matters.
Tell us about a regret you're still learning to make peace with.
Tell us about a goodbye you never got to say. What would you say now?
Tell us about the person you're quietly hoping to become. What's the first step?
Tell us about a time you chose honesty even though it cost you something.
Tell us about a part of yourself you've hidden because you feared how it would be received.
Tell us about someone you forgave, or are still trying to. What has that been like?

chaotic.text: Tell us about a completely useless talent you have. How did you even discover it?
Tell us about the weirdest thing you genuinely believe. And how you got there.
Tell us about the last time you laughed until you couldn't breathe. What set it off?
Tell us about a food combo you love that horrifies everyone. When did this start?
Tell us about a time your competitive side completely took over. What happened?
Tell us about your worst outfit or haircut phase. Walk us through what you were thinking.
Tell us about the last unhinged thing you Googled. And what led you there.
Tell us your villain origin story. Dramatize the moment it all began.
Tell us about the most unhinged thing you've done that you'd 100% do again. Set the scene.
Tell us about the pettiest thing you've ever done. Who wronged you, and how'd you get them back?
Tell us about a habit of yours that would horrify your friends. How'd it start?
Tell us about the worst advice you ever gave with total confidence. What happened?
Tell us about a text you're SO glad you never sent. What was going on?
Tell us about the most chaotic decision you've made on zero sleep.
Tell us about a dream so ridiculous you've never said it out loud. Go on.
Tell us about the wildest rumor you've heard about yourself. And the actual truth.
Tell us about something you do when absolutely no one is watching. Been caught yet?
Tell us about the dumbest hill you'll die on. And make your case.
Tell us about the closest you've come to blowing up your own life. What happened?
Tell us about a chaotic choice you made that secretly changed everything.
Tell us about a fear hiding under all your jokes. When does it show up?
Tell us about something reckless you did to run from something. What were you avoiding?
Tell us about your messiest year. And the most honest thing it taught you.
Tell us about a wild dream you'd chase tomorrow if no one would judge you.
Tell us about someone who saw you at your most chaotic and stuck around. Why does that matter?
Tell us about a part of your past you laugh about now but that actually hurt.
Everyone: show or describe the last photo in your camera roll. And the story behind it.
Everyone: tell us the one word your group chat would use for you. And a moment that earned it.
Everyone: reveal your most-used emoji and the story of how it got that bad.
Everyone: confess the pettiest thing you've done this month.
Everyone: tell us about a dream you'd start tonight if money didn't exist.
Tell us about a nickname you've had that you'll never live down. How did you get it?
Tell us about the last time you embarrassed yourself in public. Spare no detail.
Tell us about the weirdest family tradition you grew up with. How did it start?
Tell us about your most irrational fear. When did it last get the better of you?
Tell us about a lie you told that completely spiraled out of control.
Tell us about the pettiest thing you've ever done. We're not judging. Okay, a little.
Tell us about a wildly specific hill you will absolutely die on.
Tell us about a time you got caught doing something you swore nobody would find out.
Tell us about the most chaotic crush story you have. How did it end?
Tell us about the most ridiculous thing you'd do if money and shame didn't exist.
Tell us about the dumbest thing you've ever cried about. Take us through it.
Tell us about a decision you made on pure impulse that actually changed something.
Tell us about a time chaos in your life accidentally turned into the best thing.
Tell us about the closest call you've ever had. How did you walk away from it?
Tell us about the most rebellious thing you did growing up that your family still doesn't know.
Tell us about a time you completely humiliated yourself for someone you liked.
Tell us about a secret ambition so big it almost feels silly to say out loud.
Tell us about the wildest risk you've ever taken. Would you do it again?
Tell us about a night that got gloriously out of hand. Where did it end up?
